rationale: The school safety allotment under §48.160 is calculated based on average daily attendance and campus count, with no reference to homestead exemption amounts or property tax values. No direct conflict exists.
quote: a school district is entitled to an annual allotment equal to the sum of the following amounts or a greater amount provided by appropriation
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district revenue is possible but not addressed in this statute's operative text.
